name: ai-data-hub-uploader
displayName: Mobile eXperience AI Data Hub Uploader
description: Mobile eXperience AI Data Hub — upload, bundle and search records in your Mobile eXperience AI Data Hub backend — drag-drop original files (.docx/.pdf/.pptx/.md/.xlsx), or pre-converted JSON+resources zip bundles, plus semantic / FTS / tag search, agent CRUD with downloadable Word templates.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run build && npm run verify:webview
